The '''Bothan frigate''' was a [[Warship/Legends|warship]] deployed by the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] for use by the [[Confederation Fleet]]. It was produced by the [[Tallaani Shipyards]].

==History==
The result was the Tallani-built Bothan [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]], which was noted for heavier than normal armor plating and a impressive array of weaponry. At least nineteen of the frigates had been delivered to the Bothan military, with more to be purchased. Despite their impressive firepower and armor, the vessels were outmatched by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] warship [[Bounty (warship)|''Bounty'']] and the frigate [[Daring (frigate)|''Daring'']]. Of the nineteen vessels that engaged the Alliance patrol near [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]], twelve were destroyed or crippled by Alliance fire. They were not, however, fully crewed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1st}}
